description: Staff or student profile header showing name, title, department, primary role, optional secondary roles, optional post-nominal letters, and an optional profile picture with a modal enlargement.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Basic profile with no photo, no post-nominals, and no secondary role

stories.name: WithPostNominals
stories.description: Profile including post-nominal letters after the name

props.title: Professor
props.postNominals: BEng, MSc, PhD, CEng, FIMechE, SFHEA.
props.department: School of Mechanical, Aerospace and Civil Engineering
props.secondaryRole: Departmental Director of Research and Innovation

stories.name: WithPhoto
stories.description: Profile with a photo thumbnail and modal enlargement

stories.name: WithPhotoAndSecondaryRole
stories.description: Full profile with photo, post-nominals, primary and secondary role

props.title: Professor
props.department: School of Mechanical, Aerospace and Civil Engineering
props.secondaryRole: Head of New Interdisciplinary Engineering Programmes

stories.name: NoTitle
stories.description: Profile for a person without an honorific title (e.g. a PhD student)

props.department: School of Sociological Studies, Politics and International Relations
props.profileImageAlt: Sociological Studies PhD student Nick Morgan

notes: h1 contains title (optional), firstName, lastName as text. postNominals in p.postnom after h1. secondaryRole in p.roles. .profilepic block absent when no photo — when present includes thumbnail figure, enlarge button, and .profilepic-modal div. Enlarge button text and close button aria-label are hardcoded.
htmlExamples:
Dr Paraskevi Katsiampa

BSc, MSc, PhD

Management School

Lecturer in Financial Management

Professor Rob Howell

BEng, SFHEA, PhD

School of Mechanical, Aerospace and Civil Engineering

Professor of Aerospace Engineering

Head of New Interdisciplinary Engineering Programmes
